examples: One megahertz is the same as one thousand kilohertz.
Zap a hydrogen atom and it will resonate at a particular rate: 1420 megahertz (MHz).
A few years ago people buying computers only looked at megahertz, or how many gigahertz, and so on.
How do you create a consumer brand in a business ruled by dry specs like carats and megahertz?
Washington is contemplating new sales of up to 500 megahertz (MHz) of underutilized or government-owned spectrum.
